_comment: ShortsBot AWS Headless Config — edit this file to configure your daily automation

channel._comment_folder: Set to 'auto' to pick the first channel in accounts/, or set exact folder name e.g. 'MyChannel'

niche._comment_key: Set to 'auto' to use saved niche from channel folder, or override: motivation|finance|tech|education|gaming|fitness|cooking|general

schedule._comment_time: 2:30 UTC = 8:00 AM IST — low traffic, high processing success rate

video._comment_format: standard = 16:9 long-form (8-12 min). auto_clip_to_shorts will also create Shorts.
video._comment_duration: Target 8-12 min — best YouTube retention + ad revenue sweet spot
video._comment_clip: After uploading full video, auto-clip 1 Short from it (daily Short quota)
